subject: FW: To Landon Thomas RE: Jeffrey Epstein
body:
From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu] 
Sent: Tuesday, June 24, 2008 7:34 PM
To: Landon Thomas Jr.
Subject: To Landon Thomas RE: Jeffrey Epstein

 

Hi Landon -

Good to hear from you - I trust you enjoyed the trenchant think-tank
session at in Cambridge last fall!

Just picked up your email - took over the MGH Neurology Inpatient
Consult Service, so it was a pretty hectic day donning my physician cap
for an intense couple of weeks taking care of patients with stroke,
encephalitis, cancer, MS, etc.

Would you be so kind as to call me tomorrow Wed 6/25 between 7A and 8A
or between 2:30P and 4P? The rest of the day is chock full, but Thursday
between 11A and 3P should be wide open. I'm also available tonight Tues
until 9P if it's not too late already. (I thought it better not to call
you after 5P at the number you sent earlier.)

My cellphone number is 781-██████. Or you can call the hospital page
operators at 617-726-2066, give them your name and number, and I will
call back promptly.

Looking forward to it -

Yours,
Mark

Mark Jude Tramo, MD, PhD
Director, The Institute for Music & Brain Science
Dept of Neurology, Harvard Medical School & Massachusetts General
Hospital
Advisory Board, National Center for Human Performance
Best Doctors in America(r)/ America's Top Physicians(r)/Best of
Boston(r)
Songwriter Member, ASCAP

Mailing Address:  175 Cambridge St, Suite 340, Boston, MA 02114 USA
Email  MTramo@HMS.Harvard.edu
URL  http://www.BrainMusic.org
Cellphone (24/7)  781-██████████
Page Operator (for call back)  617-726-2066



-----Original Message-----
From:   Landon Thomas Jr. [mailto:landont@nytimes.com]
Sent:   Tue 6/24/2008 2:40 PM
To:     Tramo, Mark Jude
Cc:    
Subject:        Jeffrey Epstein

Hi Mark.

Its Landon Thomas from the New York Times -- we met at Jeffrey's
conveing of
scientists last November. The story may be coming out soon and I wanted
to
run by you something you said that I would like to use in the article.

My number is 212 ████████.

Thanks.

Landon Thomas
